analyses.name: Northern Trust
analyses.verdict: Top-scoring trust-bank breakout — RS at new highs, tight VCP, cheap at 14.8x, earnings 7/22 the catalyst.

financials.summary: A wealth-management and custody bank whose earnings power reset higher as rates stayed elevated: net interest income expanded, trust/investment fees compounded with markets, and expense discipline lifted operating leverage. The scan's trailing figures show EPS +43% and revenue +14% YoY — the fastest profit growth of the trust-bank leaders.
highlights: Assets under custody/administration and AUM at record levels
ROE improvement on higher NII + fee leverage

accomplishments: RS line pushed to new 52-week highs vs the S&P — institutional accumulation
Sustained fee growth alongside rate-driven NII expansion
Capital return maintained through buybacks and dividend

journey_52w.summary: Base-and-breakout year: NTRS spent the first half consolidating, then trended steadily to a fresh 52-week high ($182.86) on a tightening 3-contraction VCP as the trust-bank group re-rated on durable rates and fee growth.

milestones.label: H2 2025
milestones.note: Ground out a multi-month base while NII expectations firmed

milestones.label: Q2 2026
milestones.note: RS line broke to new highs; VCP tightened to a 4.0% contraction

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: Pressing the 52-week high into the 7/22 earnings print

risks: Earnings 2026-07-22 — event risk into the report
Rate-cut cycle would compress NII
Correlated with BK/STT — concentrated if paired
catalysts: Continued equity-market strength lifting fee revenue
critical.valuation: 14.8x forward — inexpensive for +40%-ish EPS growth; re-rating room if the group leadership persists.

analyses.name: Arista Networks
analyses.verdict: Cleanest large-cap tech breakout — AI-networking demand, RS at new highs, RSI only 60, TV STRONG BUY.

financials.summary: High-performance data-center networking (switches/routers + EOS software) with best-in-class gross margins (~60%+) and operating margins in the low-40s. Growth is being pulled forward by AI back-end network build-outs at hyperscalers; the scan's trailing revenue +35% YoY reflects that acceleration.
highlights: Hyperscaler AI-networking wins driving the reacceleration

accomplishments: Established as the merchant-silicon networking leader for AI/ML clusters
Expanded 800G/AI Ethernet portfolio against InfiniBand
RS line at new highs with the strongest analyst consensus on the board (1.3)

journey_52w.summary: Trended from the low-$100s to a new 52-week high at $184.69 over the year on the AI-networking narrative, digesting each leg in a long 7-contraction VCP — orderly accumulation rather than a blow-off.

milestones.label: Late 2025
milestones.note: AI back-end networking orders inflected higher

milestones.label: H1 2026
milestones.note: Guidance raises confirmed the AI Ethernet ramp

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: New 52-week high with RSI still only 60 — un-extended

risks: 41.5x forward — priced for continued hypergrowth
Hyperscaler capex concentration — a few customers drive results
Competitive/AI-Ethernet-vs-InfiniBand share dynamics
watch: Customer concentration and cloud-titan capex commentary
critical.valuation: 41.5x forward — a growth multiple justified only if 30%+ revenue growth persists; the risk is multiple compression on any capex-digestion scare.

analyses.name: Eli Lilly
analyses.verdict: GLP-1 leader still compounding — EPS +170%/rev +56%, RS at new highs, reasonable at 27x on 50%+ growth.

financials.summary: Pharma powerhouse whose income statement is being transformed by the incretin franchise (Mounjaro/Zepbound) layered on established oncology, immunology and neuroscience. Operating leverage is enormous as high-margin GLP-1 volume scales — the scan's trailing EPS +170% and revenue +56% YoY capture the inflection.
highlights: Heavy capacity capex to meet incretin demand

accomplishments: Scaled tirzepatide manufacturing to ease supply constraints
Expanded GLP-1 label/indications (obesity, cardiometabolic)
RS line at new highs — mega-cap leadership rare in this tape

journey_52w.summary: Climbed from ~$620 to a 52-week high near $1,236 over the year as incretin revenue and capacity ramped, with periodic pullbacks on pricing/competition headlines that resolved into higher highs. Currently ~1.5% off the high in a tight 5-contraction VCP.

milestones.note: Zepbound/Mounjaro volumes and supply improved through the year

milestones.label: H1 2026
milestones.note: Continued beats-and-raises kept the RS line at new highs

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: Consolidating just under the high ahead of 8/5 earnings

risks: GLP-1 competition (Novo and oral/next-gen entrants)
Pricing/political scrutiny on obesity drugs
$1,217 share price — position by dollars not shares
catalysts: Incretin label expansions and oral-GLP-1 readouts
watch: Incretin volume/supply and share vs Novo
Hold of the VCP / RS at highs
critical.valuation: 27x forward for 50%+ revenue growth — reasonable for the quality; the debate is durability of incretin growth, not the current multiple.

analyses.name: Elevance Health
analyses.verdict: MCO turnaround with TV's strongest healthcare confirmation (15/1/10); earnings 7/15 is catalyst and risk.

financials.summary: A managed-care insurer (health benefits + Carelon services) with ~$170B+ in operating revenue. The scan flags EPS -17% YoY — the medical-cost/utilization pressure that reset the group — but revenue is still growing and the technical turn (33% 3-month momentum) says the market is pricing a recovery at only 14.3x forward.
highlights: Operating revenue in the ~$170B+ range, still growing
Trailing EPS -17% YoY — the cost-trend reset
RS line at new 52-week highs on the turnaround

accomplishments: Grew Carelon health-services revenue
Membership stability across commercial/Medicare/Medicaid
RS line broke to new highs as the group recovered off its lows

journey_52w.summary: Round-trip-and-recover: ELV was pressured through 2025 on elevated medical-cost trend, based out, then rallied 33% over the last three months to within 0.5% of a new high as investors bet the cost cycle has peaked.

milestones.note: De-rated on rising medical-loss ratios / utilization

milestones.label: Q2 2026
milestones.note: Momentum turned; RS line reclaimed new highs

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: Pressing the high into the 7/15 earnings print

risks: Earnings 2026-07-15 — the cost-trend update is binary
Medical-cost inflation / Medicaid redetermination headwinds
EPS still declining YoY — technicals lead fundamentals here
catalysts: Evidence the cost cycle has peaked
critical.valuation: 14.3x forward — cheap if the earnings trough is in; the setup is a bet on that turn, so the 7/15 print matters most.

analyses.name: The Bank of New York Mellon
analyses.verdict: Tightest custodial-bank VCP (2.5%), RS at new highs, EPS +42%; earnings ~7/15 the pre-report catalyst.

financials.summary: The world's largest custodian bank — fee-driven (asset servicing, issuer services, clearing) with a rate-sensitive NII kicker. Operating leverage and efficiency initiatives lifted profitability; the scan's trailing EPS +42%/revenue +13% YoY reflect both the fee and NII tailwinds at just 14.2x forward.
highlights: Fee income + NII both contributing; efficiency program aiding margins

accomplishments: Platform/efficiency initiatives driving positive operating leverage
RS line at new highs alongside NTRS/STT
Steady capital return via buybacks/dividend

journey_52w.summary: Steady Stage-2 advance to a 52-week high near $147 on the tightest VCP in the group (2.5% contraction), tracking the custodial-bank re-rating on durable rates and record servicing balances.

milestones.label: H2 2025
milestones.note: Based and trended higher with the trust-bank group

milestones.label: Q2 2026
milestones.note: RS at new highs; VCP tightened to 2.5%

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: Pressing highs into the ~7/15 earnings window

risks: Earnings ~2026-07-15 — event risk in days
NII compression if the Fed cuts
No TradingView rating resolved this run to cross-check
catalysts: Continued market strength lifting servicing fees
watch: Hold of the tight VCP breakout
critical.valuation: 14.2x forward — cheap for +40% EPS growth; a fee-based, lower-credit-risk way to own the financials leadership.

analyses.name: Goldman Sachs
analyses.verdict: Most un-extended financials leader — RSI 39, coiling VCP, TV STRONG BUY; earnings ~7/14 the catalyst.

financials.summary: Global investment bank re-accelerating as capital-markets activity (M&A, ECM/DCM, trading) recovered, with Asset & Wealth Management adding stable fee income after the retreat from consumer. The scan shows trailing EPS +24%/revenue +15% YoY at a modest 15.8x forward.
highlights: AWM fee income stabilizing the mix post-consumer wind-down

accomplishments: Rebuilt IB market share as the deal cycle turned
Grew Asset & Wealth Management fee streams
TV STRONG BUY (16/1/9) despite an un-extended RSI — TV reads the base as strength

journey_52w.summary: Advanced toward $1,100+ over the year on the capital-markets recovery, then pulled back ~5% into a 5-contraction VCP with RSI at 39 — a coiled, un-extended leader rather than an exhausted one.

milestones.note: IB/trading revenue re-accelerated as activity returned

milestones.label: Q2 2026
milestones.note: Hit new highs, then began a shallow constructive pullback

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: Coiling into the ~7/14 earnings print, RSI 39

risks: Earnings ~2026-07-14 — trading/IB revenue is lumpy
Capital-markets activity is macro/rate-sensitive
$1,056 share price — size in dollars
critical.valuation: 15.8x forward — reasonable for a cyclical at an up-cycle inflection; the coiled chart offers defined risk into the print.

analyses.name: eBay Inc.
analyses.verdict: Cheap e-commerce breakout at new RS highs — 17.4x, TV STRONG BUY with zero sell votes (16/0/10).

financials.summary: Marketplace operator with ~$10B revenue and stable ~$75B GMV, monetizing via ads and managed payments. Focus categories (collectibles, refurbished, parts) reaccelerated GMV; the scan shows trailing revenue +20% YoY with strong buybacks amplifying EPS at only 17.4x forward.

accomplishments: Focus-category (collectibles/refurbished) GMV reacceleration
Advertising revenue growth lifting take rate
RS line to new 52-week highs — rare for a value-multiple name

journey_52w.summary: Ground from the mid-$70s to a new high near $118 on GMV stabilization and buyback-driven EPS, breaking out of a 4-contraction base with RS at new highs.

milestones.note: GMV stabilized as focus categories grew

milestones.label: H1 2026
milestones.note: Ad take-rate gains + buybacks drove the re-rating

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: New RS highs, RSI 71 into 7/30 earnings

risks: RSI 71 — warm; prefer entries near the breakout
Mature marketplace — GMV growth is slow, story is monetization + buybacks
Consumer-discretionary sensitivity
critical.valuation: 17.4x forward — inexpensive; the appeal is a name making new RS highs without a rich multiple, backed by TV's zero-sell rating.

analyses.name: GE Aerospace
analyses.verdict: Un-extended aerospace leader (RSI 52, -5% off high); rev +25% on the engine-services supercycle.

financials.summary: Pure-play aerospace propulsion (engines + high-margin aftermarket services) post the GE Vernova/HealthCare separations. The services/spares annuity drives margin and cash; the scan shows trailing revenue +25% YoY with strong FCF conversion. Best-in-class analyst consensus (1.5).
highlights: Analyst consensus 1.5 — among the most bullish here

accomplishments: Completed the aerospace-focused simplification (Vernova/HealthCare spins)
Backlog and shop-visit demand at records on the fleet-utilization cycle
Consistent guidance raises through the year

journey_52w.summary: Trended from ~$250 to a high near $379 on the services supercycle, then pulled back ~5% into a 3-contraction VCP with RSI 52 — coiling, not extended, ahead of 7/16 earnings.

milestones.note: Aerospace-only GE re-rated on services strength

milestones.label: Q2 2026
milestones.note: New highs, then a constructive shallow pullback

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: Basing at RSI 52 into the 7/16 print

risks: 41x forward — full multiple
Earnings 2026-07-16 — event risk
TV shows 6 sell votes (11/6/9) reflecting the pullback — not a clean all-clear
critical.valuation: 41x forward — premium justified by the services annuity and FCF; the un-extended chart is the appeal, the multiple is the risk.

analyses.name: Fortinet
analyses.verdict: Elite but parabolic — RS at new highs and TV STRONG BUY, yet +103% in 3 months and RSI 72. Wait for a pullback.

financials.summary: Network-security vendor (FortiGate firewalls + expanding SASE/SecOps software) with ~$6B revenue, high-40s% operating margins and strong FCF. The scan shows trailing revenue +20%/EPS +29% YoY as security spend and platform consolidation favor the leaders.
highlights: Operating margins in the high-40s%, strong FCF
SASE / SecOps software mix rising vs hardware

accomplishments: Grew SASE/SecOps software faster than the hardware base
Sustained best-in-class security margins
RS line to new 52-week highs with TV STRONG BUY (15/1/10)

journey_52w.summary: A monster year — up ~103% over the last three months alone to a 52-week high at $163.73, a near-vertical advance that has RSI at 72. Leadership is real; the price is extended.

milestones.note: Product-cycle/refresh + SASE momentum reaccelerated growth

milestones.label: Q2 2026
milestones.note: Broke out and went near-parabolic (+103% in 3 months)

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: At the high, RSI 72, into 7/30 earnings

risks: +103% in 3 months, RSI 72 — high pullback risk; don't chase
48x forward — rich after the run
Earnings 2026-07-30 into an extended chart
watch: A pullback toward the rising 21-EMA for entry
critical.valuation: ~48x forward — priced for continued acceleration; the setup is a WATCH purely on entry, not on quality.

analyses.name: Monster Beverage
analyses.verdict: Best consumer-defensive setup — a staple at new RS highs, tight 2.0% VCP, rev +27%.

financials.summary: Energy-drink leader (~$7.5B revenue) with premium gross margins and net-cash balance sheet. Pricing, international expansion and the alcohol/Bang integration drove the scan's trailing revenue +27%/EPS +29% YoY — genuine growth atop defensive demand.
highlights: Premium gross margins, net-cash balance sheet

accomplishments: International volume expansion
Margin recovery as input costs normalized
RS line to new highs — unusual leadership for a staple

journey_52w.summary: Climbed to a 52-week high near $97.64 (now ~1% below) on margin recovery and international growth, tracing the tightest consumer-staples VCP on the board (2.0% contraction).

milestones.note: Margins recovered as freight/aluminum eased

milestones.label: H1 2026
milestones.note: RS line to new highs on international momentum

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: Tight VCP just under the high, RSI 68

risks: 37x forward — premium multiple for a beverage
Earnings 2026-08-07 — no near-term catalyst
Input-cost / FX sensitivity
critical.valuation: 37x forward — rich but supported by ~27% growth and a fortress balance sheet; a growth-y defensive anchor.

analyses.name: Space Exploration Technologies (SpaceX)
analyses.verdict: NEW LISTING — trade the thesis, not the quant. Starlink-led growth story; too little history for breakout signals, and TradingView has no meaningful rating yet.

financials.summary: SpaceX combines a dominant launch business (Falcon 9/Heavy reusability + Starship development) with the fast-scaling Starlink satellite-broadband franchise, which has become the revenue and growth engine. As a newly public name the public financials are still thin — treat headline revenue/subscriber figures as directional, not audited-comparable, and lead with the business and valuation, not the scan's quant signals.
highlights: Starlink subscriber and revenue growth the core driver
Launch cadence/reusability underpins a structural cost advantage
Starship development is the long-dated optionality (and cash sink)
Valuation extreme on any near-term earnings basis (~176x on the scan's forward figure)
Limited trading history — 52-week breakout signals not yet meaningful

accomplishments: Starlink scaled to the leading LEO broadband network
Record reusable-launch cadence
IPO/listing completed — now investable in public markets

journey_52w.summary: As a recent listing, SPCX has only a short public trading history (roughly a $148–$211 range so far) dominated by IPO-momentum and lock-up dynamics rather than a classic base. Held by two of your users near ~$160–$205 cost, so both are currently underwater around the ~$152 level.

milestones.label: IPO
milestones.note: Listed; heavy initial volume and volatility

milestones.label: Post-IPO
milestones.note: Trading a wide range on momentum/lock-up flows, not a defined base

milestones.label: Jul 2026
milestones.note: ~$152 — mid-range; breakout signals still blank pending more history

risks: Extreme valuation (~176x forward) — priced for flawless Starlink + Starship execution
Newly public — thin float, high volatility, lock-up overhang
Starship program is capital-intensive with technical/schedule risk
No reliable TradingView technical rating yet
catalysts: Index inclusion / analyst initiations as history builds
watch: Starlink net adds and margin trajectory
critical.valuation: ~176x forward — a story/optionality stock, not a value or technical case. Size as a small speculative position; the thesis is Starlink's growth curve, not the chart.
